messages.content: what are the important guidlines mentioned for the facultty

{"intent": "guidelines_summary", "title": "Important Guidelines for NMIMS Faculty", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": "General Applicability", "type": "bullets", "items": ["These guidelines apply to all full-time regular faculty, contractual faculty, visiting and adjunct faculty, and Professors of Practice [3]."]}, {"heading": "Academic Conduct & Attendance", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Faculty are responsible for recording attendance through the NMIMS Attendance Management System (AMS) within 30 minutes of class end [2].", "At the end of the semester, faculty must certify final attendance records and identify students below the 75% attendance threshold for debarment from examinations [2].", "Any deviation in syllabus coverage must be reported to the Programme Director [4]."]}, {"heading": "Professional & Ethical Standards", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Classes must not be cancelled without prior written approval from the Department Head. A makeup class must be arranged within the same week if cancellation is unavoidable [4]."]}, {"heading": "Outside Employment & Consultancy", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Full-time regular faculty require prior written approval from the Vice Chancellor for outside employment [5].", "Consultancy work is permitted up to 52 days per year (non-teaching days only) with no conflict of interest, and revenue sharing follows institutional policy [5]."]}, {"heading": "Resource Availability", "type": "bullets", "items": ["The Employee Resource Book is available to answer questions and provide information on policies, procedures, entitlements, and values [6]."]}], "footer": null, "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
